title: -47. Mother’s Body[ ... words ]
content:
To continue serving our readers, I have removed Korean novels due to copyright issues.

Thank you for your continued support. I'm still working hard to bring you more great novels and the best reading experience possible.

Lorraine rushed into the women’s restroom, entered the stall closest to the entrance, and locked the door.

She took a moment to steady her breathing, then slowly loosened the top of her clothes, revealing her thin pink bra.

She carefully checked beneath her bra and saw that milk was leaking from her nipples. It was, of course, caused by Limbo groping her earlier.

Just like when Gold had touched her, Lorraine’s breasts had become extremely sensitive lately. Even a moderate amount of stimulation was enough to make her lactate. On top of that, she hadn’t expressed any milk at all today, so her breasts were painfully full. Even Limbo’s rough handling had been enough to force milk out.

Normally she would wake up early in the morning to pump, or do it after work, but she had missed both opportunities today. As a result, her breasts were heavily engorged.

（I should let out a little…）

Knowing she might get groped again at any moment and feeling the uncomfortable fullness, Lorraine tore off a small piece of toilet paper with her right hand. She pulled her left breast out of the bra, brought the paper close to her nipple, and began gently squeezing.

The moment she started massaging her own breast, a white liquid began to flow from her nipple. The strength of the flow changed depending on how hard she pressed.

（I have to hurry… or Takuma-san will get suspicious…）

She had managed to escape to the toilet, but she had left Takuma without saying much. He had no idea what she was doing in here, and she didn’t want him to feel uncomfortable or worried. Lorraine couldn’t bear the thought of treating Takuma poorly.

（I need to be quick…）

The toilet paper in her right hand was already quite soaked. As she bent down to grab another piece, she heard the sound of a stall door opening.

Even though Lorraine had entered a stall and locked it, her upper body was exposed, with one breast completely out. She quickly covered her chest with her arms and held her breath.

The door closed again. Someone walked past her stall and entered the neighboring one. Then came the sound of the lock clicking shut.

Even in a tavern full of rowdy male adventurers, female customers and waitresses existed, so it wasn’t strange for someone to enter the women’s restroom. Women also tended to take longer in the bathroom, so Lorraine quietly reached for the toilet paper again, trying not to make any noise.

But at that moment, there was a rustling sound from the next stall.

It clearly wasn’t the sound of someone using the toilet. Wondering what it was, she looked toward the partition wall. There was a gap above it.

If someone stood on the toilet seat, it was more than enough space to climb over.

When Lorraine looked up, a young man was grinning down at her from above the partition. He skillfully climbed over the wall and dropped into her stall.

“Whoa there. Please stay quiet. Nothing good will come from screaming here, you know?”

The young man quickly clamped his right hand over Lorraine’s mouth before she could raise her voice, muffling any sound.

“Even if you call for help right now, the only ones who will come are those drunk adventurers. That would be much worse for you, wouldn’t it, Lorraine-san?”

The young man knew her name, but Lorraine had no recollection of him. From his appearance, he looked like an adventurer, but she couldn’t remember ever meeting him.

“Besides, I’m here to help you, Lorraine-san.”

As if to prove his words, he used his left hand to poke at the breast she couldn’t fully cover.

“Your chest hurts, doesn’t it?”

From an angle she couldn’t see, he suddenly poked the underside of her breast. Lorraine’s body twitched involuntarily.

The young man didn’t miss that reaction. He slipped his right hand into his coat, then brought it back to her face with incredible speed. Using a magician-like sleight of hand, he wrapped a cloth around her mouth, gagging her.

Judging from how he had prepared the cloth with his left hand while touching her breast, Lorraine realized he was likely a thief or rogue-type adventurer.

But even if she understood that now, it was meaningless.

She desperately reached both hands toward the back of her head to try and remove the gag, but that too was exactly what the young man had anticipated.
